| `csrrwi` | `rd, csr, uimm5` | `rd ← csr; csr ← uimm5` | *CSR read/write immediate* | I |
| `csrrsi` | `rd, csr, uimm5` | `rd ← csr; csr ← csr OR uimm5` | *CSR read and set bits immediate* | I |
| `csrrci` | `rd, csr, uimm5` | `rd ← csr; csr ← csr AND NOT uimm5` | *CSR read and clear bits immediate* | I |
